kind: ruling amendment (SC-0064 proposition_kind Group B-1 collapse, Marcia 2026-06-13)

edits.why: Marcia's B-1 collapse ruling: DIVINE_WORD_CAME (J01 1:1) and WORD_OF_YHWH_CAME (J04 3:1) are the same 'word of YHWH came to Jonah' formula. Collapsed to the literal survivor WORD_OF_YHWH_CAME; DIVINE_WORD_CAME is NOT promoted. WORD_OF_YHWH_CAME promoted to proposition_kind under SC-0064 (J01 ruling log, covering J01+J04).
